item_001.name: Grandeur Full Breakfast
item_001.description: Eggs your way, grilled tomatoes, sautéed mushrooms, crispy turkey bacon, toasted sourdough, and freshly squeezed orange juice.

item_002.name: Suya Skewers
item_002.description: Tender beef marinated in our signature suya spice blend, grilled over an open flame and served with pickled onion and tomato salsa.

item_003.name: Egusi Soup & Pounded Yam
item_003.description: A rich, aromatic Egusi soup slow-cooked with assorted meats and leafy vegetables, served with silky hand-pounded yam.

item_004.name: Pan-Seared Tilapia
item_004.description: Fresh Tilapia fillet seared to golden perfection, served on a bed of jollof coconut rice with grilled plantain and herb butter.

item_005.name: Chin-Chin Cheesecake
item_005.description: A modern Nigerian twist on a classic — creamy vanilla cheesecake on a buttery chin-chin crust, drizzled with tiger nut caramel.

item_006.name: Zobo Royal
item_006.description: Hibiscus flowers steeped with ginger, cloves, and a hint of pineapple — refreshingly served over crushed ice with a sugared rim.
